title: Lux & Lumen Calculator
description: Estimate required lumens from room area and target illuminance.
helper: Enter area and target lux to get required lumens. Add lumens to see estimated lux and coverage.

tips.target: Living rooms often use 150–300 lx, reading 300–500 lx.
tips.lumens: Add up the lumens from all light sources in the room.

result.title: Result
result.none: Fill in the inputs to see results.
